_meta.purpose: Mutation-class boundary-condition probe fixture for framework-auditor axis-10.d. Single source of truth for round-checker TP-2 §6.b clauses (i)-(vi) coverage enforcement. Consumed by framework/agents/specialist/framework-auditor.md (runtime probe construction) and framework/agents/specialist/round-checker.md (closure-gate verification).
_meta.spec_anchor: apex-spec.md IMP-008 / IMP-014 / IMP-015 / IMP-017 + 'Fail-loud, never fail-silent' principle (line 379). Campaign C CR-C-14. Phase-7 R-AT-C-02 closes AC-5b heldout B+C+D >= 5/5.
_meta.preservation_contract: Round-checker enforces fixture-UNION as coverage floor. Any new guard added to a regex_word_boundary / case_folding / silent_failure / counter_swallow class becomes a HARD GATE for trial closure. Per-class minimums (regex-deny >=1 canonical + >=1 boundary; case_folding >=3 case variants; silent_failure >=1 stderr-non-empty assertion; counter_swallow >=1 forced-FAIL probe) are unchanged.

regex_word_boundary.payload_construction_protocol: Auditor constructs literal payloads in-memory at runtime under __APEX_AUDIT_PROBE__ marker carve-out (framework/hooks/security.cjs auditProbe.check). NEVER write resolved literals to disk; the canonical reference for the literal forms is the comment block in framework-auditor.md axis-10.a which cites the workaround in detector-review/RESUME-PROMPT.md.

case_folding.payload_construction_protocol: Same as regex_word_boundary[].prompt-guard entry. Auditor-in-memory only; no disk-written literals.

silent_failure.probe_description: malformed jq expression passed as argv

counter_swallow.contract: global FAIL counter MUST increment on test failure (decrement only on intentional retract)
counter_swallow.probe_description: force one assert_fail; assert counter incremented by exactly 1
